title: Ambitious plan to transform support for Coventry children with special educational needs
summary: Coventry City Council has published plans to transform how children and young people with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) are supported across the city.

title: City Centre shop closed that persistently sold illegal tobacco, vapes, and dangerous toys
summary: Spon Mini Market, located on Spon Street within the Coventry City Centre, has been ordered to close for persistently selling illegal tobacco, vapes, and dangerous toys.

title: Bands in the Park returns to Coventry this summer with free family concerts
summary: Coventry City Council’s popular Bands in the Park series returns next month, bringing eight free live music performances to the city’s green spaces throughout the summer.

title: Good news for adult social care in Coventry
summary: Following an announcement today the Care Quality Commission (CQC) has rated the Council’s Adult Social Care Services as good.

title: Three arrested from High Street stores in Coventry operation
summary: We’re taking tough action against High Street stores which are funding organised crime through sales of illicit goods and fuelling anti-social behaviour and violence.

title: Coventry City Council confirms Leader and Cabinet for 2026/27
summary: Coventry City Council has confirmed its Leader and Cabinet following yesterday's Annual General Meeting of Full Council.
